name: @agenomics/load-harness
description: Operator-driven devnet load-test harness for AEP. Phase 1 of B9 (PRE_MAINNET_ROADMAP §3).
_comments: This package intentionally has NO `dependencies` block. The harness
@solana/spl-token + better-sqlite3 + tsx via Node's normal module
resolution walking up to the repo root. Keeping it dependency-free
matches the fuzz/ Phase 1 pattern (standalone but minimal-install).
Add deps here only if a load-only library (e.g. percentile-tdigest)
is needed beyond the lifecycle ix surface.
